name: iZooto
description: iZooto — Web and app push notification platform for publishers with audience segmentation, automation, and monetization tools.

seo.title: iZooto — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: iZooto: iZooto — Web and app push notification platform for publishers with audience segmentation, automation, and monetization tools.

when_to_use: Web push and app push notifications with audience segmentation for publishers
Automated push campaigns to drive return traffic for content sites
Push notification monetization via sponsored push ads for media publishers
Re-engagement push sequences for mobile apps and PWAs

pros: Targeted at publishers with monetization features
cons: Web push focus — weak on mobile apps
Monetization ads can conflict with premium brand feel
Deliverability varies across browsers over time
Pricing jumps sharply past free tier
review.verdict: Solid web push tool for publishers who want monetization baked in; wrong fit for product-led SaaS.
review.best_for: Content publishers growing traffic with opt-in web push
review.not_for: SaaS or mobile apps needing behavioral messaging
